::: {.exercise
```         
 data-id="{{id}}"
 data-title="{{title}}"
 data-unit="{{unit}}"
 data-chapter="{{chapter}}"
 data-objective="{{objective}}"
 data-difficulty="{{difficulty}}"
 data-topic="{{topic}}"
 data-skills="{{skills}}"
 data-blooms="{{blooms}}"
 data-prerequisites="{{prerequisites}}"
 data-common-mistakes="{{mistakes}}"
 data-representation="{{representation}}"
 data-estimated-time="{{time}}"
 data-ai-level="{{ai_level}}"
 data-ai-style="{{ai_style}}"
```
:::

### {{title}}

\`\`\`{python} #\| echo: false #\| output: asis import random

# 1️⃣ Setup Randomness

seed_val = {{seed \| default("None")}} if seed_val != "None": random.seed(seed_val)

# 2️⃣ Number Generation

a = random.randint({{a_min}}, {{a_max}}) b = random.randint({{b_min}}, {{b_max}}) c = random.randint({{c_min}}, {{c_max}})

# 3️⃣ Display Problem

print(f"**Problem:** {{prompt}}")

# 4️⃣ Answer Logic

# (Make sure answer_logic defines 'correct_answer')

{{answer_logic}}

# 5️⃣ Render Hints & Answer

print(f""" ::: {{.callout-note collapse="true"}} \## Hint 1 { {hint1} } :::

::: {{.callout-note collapse="true"}} \## Hint 2 { {hint2} } :::

::: {{.callout-tip collapse="true"}} \## Reveal Answer { {answer_display} } ::: """) <!-- AI Button for Flint --> <button class="ai-button" onclick="openFlintActivity(this)" style="margin-top: 10px; padding: 0.4em 0.8em; cursor: pointer; background-color: #4f46e5; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 0.25rem; font-weight: bold;"> 🤖 AI Help </button>

```{=html}
<script> // Collect metadata and open Flint activity function openFlintActivity(button) { const exercise = button.closest('.exercise'); const metadata = {}; // Collect all data-* attributes Array.from(exercise.attributes).forEach(attr => { if (attr.name.startsWith('data-')) { metadata[attr.name.replace('data-', '')] = attr.value; } }); // Encode as URL parameters const params = new URLSearchParams(metadata).toString(); // Open Flint activity in new tab const flintURL = `https://flint.ai/activity?${params}`; // <-- replace with your Flint URL window.open(flintURL, '_blank'); } </script>
```

<!-- Try Again Button --> <button class="try-again" onclick="location.reload()" style="margin-top: 20px; padding: 10px 20px; cursor: pointer;"> 🔄 Try another version </button> \`\`\`
